since_last: 58% of 86 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.97%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 58% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.52% · BTC -1.94% · Gold -2.50% · Nasdaq100 +0.41%. 58% of 86 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.97%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.97%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at -0.86%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: RXRX is the standout at +4.59%
cards.body: Leaders: RXRX +4.59%, UPST +4.10%, WDAY +3.18%, PATH +3.10%, INTU +2.51%. Laggards: SMR -3.82%, OKLO -3.65%, OKLO -3.65%, QCOM -3.45%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.68% at $153.48
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.68% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
